summary: All-green suite (3609/3609 C#, 246/246 plang) but the two headline surfaces are false greens: Cut4 runtime-DLL goals only assert load-didn't-error (no render/overwrite), and the literal kind-stamping goals assert runtime values while the .pr carries type:object/no-kind; plus ~10 deferred no-op Assert.That(true) tests and 0% coverage on NumberPolicy Config.cs.
